utterance: How many shots were taken in Q4?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 4
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 3
notes: Turn 2: independent period swap. Verified live.

utterance: How many attempts in the final 2 minutes of Q4?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 4 AND (minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining) <= 120
notes: Bug 11 resolved: minutes_remaining backfilled via re-collection. Verified: 345 shots. Formula: total_secs = minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining.

utterance: Only made shots in that window.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 4 AND (minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining) <= 120 AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2 of pair 3. Bug 11 resolved. Verified: 165 made shots in Q4 final 2 min.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period >= 5
notes: Overtime: period >= 5. Verified: 50 OT shots, 6 OT games.

utterance: How many games went to overtime?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM shot_charts WHERE period >= 5
notes: Turn 2: COUNT DISTINCT game_id from same filter. Returns 6.

utterance: How many shots in playoff games?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE season_type = 'Playoff')
notes: Bug 12 resolved: ShotChartDetail requires season_type_all_star='Playoffs' parameter (game_id_nullable blocks playoff results). 1593 playoff shots loaded. Verified: 1593.

utterance: What was the field goal percentage in the playoffs?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE season_type = 'Playoff')
notes: Turn 2 of pair 7. Bug 12 resolved. Verified: playoff FG% = 0.469 (46.9%).

utterance: How many shots in the first half?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period IN (1, 2)
notes: First half = periods 1 and 2. Verified: 3808 shots.

utterance: Compare first half vs second half attempts.
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN period IN (1,2) THEN 'first_half' ELSE 'second_half' END as half, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE period BETWEEN 1 AND 4 GROUP BY half
notes: Turn 2: CASE WHEN splits halves; BETWEEN 1 AND 4 excludes OT. Verified live.

utterance: How many shots in the last 30 seconds of any period?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE (minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining) <= 30
notes: Bug 11 resolved. Verified: 415 shots in final 30 sec of any period.

utterance: Which period had the most attempts in those final 30 seconds?
gold_sql: SELECT period, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE (minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining) <= 30 GROUP BY period ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 1
notes: Turn 2 of pair 11. Bug 11 resolved. Verified: period 3 has most with 127 shots.

utterance: How many games were played in December 2023?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM games WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2023-12-01' AND '2023-12-31'
notes: Date range BETWEEN on games.date. Verified: 14 games.

utterance: How many shots came from those December games?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2023-12-01' AND '2023-12-31')
notes: Turn 2: December date range via subquery join. Verified live.

utterance: How many regular season games are in the dataset?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM games WHERE season_type = 'Regular'

utterance: What about just the home games?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM games WHERE season_type = 'Regular' AND home_team ILIKE '%Boston%'
notes: Turn 2: adds home_team ILIKE '%Boston%'. Handles 'Boston Celtics' string.

utterance: How many shots with more than 10 minutes left in the first quarter?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE period = 1 AND (minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining) > 600
notes: Bug 11 resolved. 10 minutes = 600 total seconds. Verified: 379 shots with >10 min left in Q1.

utterance: Were there more shots in Q1 or Q4?
gold_sql: SELECT period, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE period IN (1, 4) GROUP BY period ORDER BY period
